So after you've closed the appointment this is a Randy Woody hack for how he's gotten such amazing show breaks. He says hey so I have a couple more questions for you to make sure it's a good fit. We always ask these we always ask these questions don't be worried about one. Do you consider yourself a person of integrity? You're gonna say yes. You're like awesome it's just really important to us that we like that's the type of people that we want to work with. So you're the type of person who keeps their appointments. Is that correct? They're gonna say yes. You know like so you keep your doctor's appointments because we consider this at the same magnitude. It's just preventative of something instead of waiting till something bad happens. They're gonna say yeah okay last thing what time is your appointment? Where and with whom? And then they're gonna say my appointments tomorrow at six with Brad at the gym. Like awesome. So going forward you're gonna get two reminders. One is at 24 hours at a time and one is an hour beforehand. The most important is the 24 hour reminder because if you cannot make the appointment for any reason you need to let us know because we have people in line for the spot and as I told you it's already sold out. So it's really important that we know so that we don't waste Brad's time and they're gonna say like okay got it. And that is the integrity clause. You basically tie them down with three or four questions talking about their integrity that they're somebody who's honest and so they're the type of person who keeps their appointments and they're gonna want to be honest people. They're gonna want to keep it as a result.
